name: @prune/lsp-graph
description: F10 — LSP symbol-graph substitution. Instead of spending tokens for the model to re-derive a repo's symbol/call graph from full file bodies, inject the IDE language server's OWN index (free, authoritative): signatures + call edges, budget-selected by reference in-degree. Deterministic over a caller-supplied LSP index (the host queries the language server; this package never does). Equivalence is by construction — the graph is the language server's canonical resolution, not a model guess. No regex, no model call.
